name: Hidden Pigeon
author: Poki
description: Hidden Pigeon is a puzzle game where your mission is simple—find all the pigeons hidden in each picture! Travel across Europe, from the romantic streets of Paris to the ancient ruins of Rome, and spot these sneaky birds cleverly tucked away in iconic landmarks. Sharpen your eyes, uncover hidden surprises, and become the ultimate pigeon-finding master. Ready for a globe-trotting adventure? How to play Hidden Pigeon? Click or tap to select an item. Who created Hidden Pigeon? Hidden Pigeon is created by Alex. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Hidden Pigeon for free? You can play Hidden Pigeon for free on Poki. Can I play Hidden Pigeon on mobile devices and desktop? Hidden Pigeon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
